title: Logan Paul reveals ‘only UFO video in the world that proves aliens exist’ after secretly filming it with spy cam
description: LOGAN Paul has revealed a legendary UFO video dubbed "the best in the world" for the first time. title: A history of Austin UFO sightings: From 1897 mystery airships to Starlink lights
